_attribution: LA FORJA team (Manuel Peña Zúñiga). Original item authored by the team.
stem: Two cards are drawn from a standard 52-card deck. What is the probability that both are hearts?
author_rationale: The author assumed drawing without replacement: (13/52)·(12/51) = 1/17.

intended_defect.description: The stem never states whether the draw is with or without replacement, and both readings are reasonable for 'two cards are drawn'.
intended_defect.expected_finding: Reading A = without replacement → (13/52)·(12/51) = 1/17. Reading B = with replacement → (13/52)² = 1/16. The answers differ, so the ambiguity attack is valid.
